name: Podbielniak
answerBox: Centrifuge World is an independent specialist that repairs, rebuilds, and supplies parts for Baker Perkins Podbielniak centrifuges. Our Houston and Chicago service centers deliver full non-destructive inspection, structural welding, wear-part refitting, precision balancing, and reverse-engineered parts to restore your Podbielniak machine to peak performance.
intro: Baker Perkins Podbielniak centrifuges serve chemical processing and liquid separation duties. Centrifuge World provides independent repair, rebuild, and reverse-engineered parts support to keep these machines running at high efficiency with minimal downtime.
disclosure: Centrifuge World is an independent repair and rebuild specialist. We are not affiliated with Podbielniak.

capabilities.detail: Complete disassembly and inspection of your Baker Perkins Podbielniak centrifuge, followed by a written report with findings and recommended repairs.
Repair of areas damaged by mechanical stress, chemical attack, or erosion.
Replacement of o-rings, gaskets, and other consumable wear items.
Replacement of worn or damaged parts and execution of available performance upgrades.
Precision balancing of rotating assemblies to specification.
In-house manufacture of hard-to-find or long-lead OEM-equivalent parts, often within days.

body: Centrifuge World repairs Baker Perkins Podbielniak centrifuges and offers a wide range of services to enhance the performance of your equipment. All work is performed at our service centers in Houston, Texas and Chicago, Illinois, where qualified engineers inspect each machine and develop the right plan to rebuild it.

We provide comprehensive reconditioning and repair for all industrial centrifuges, keeping equipment operating at high efficiency and reducing process downtime. Routine maintenance is essential, and our engineers are available to troubleshoot issues or schedule an inspection.

Getting an inspection is easy: call to set up an appointment and we handle the logistics, dispatching a truck to your facility. Once the machine reaches our shop, we perform a complete non-destructive teardown inspection and send a repair quote. On approval, we complete the work and return your centrifuge in top condition, operating at peak performance.

When Podbielniak rotating equipment requires repair, we perform standard maintenance, welding of damaged areas, refitting of wear parts such as o-rings and gaskets, replacement of worn components, available upgrades, static and dynamic balancing, and a test run where the equipment allows.

We carry a wide variety of OEM-equivalent Baker Perkins Podbielniak parts. When a part is hard to locate or backlogged, our shop can reverse engineer and fabricate it, frequently within a few days. For unexpected breakdowns, rush service is available around the clock.

faqs.question: Does Centrifuge World repair Baker Perkins Podbielniak centrifuges?
faqs.answer: Yes. We repair and rebuild Baker Perkins Podbielniak centrifuges at our Houston and Chicago service centers, including non-destructive inspection, welding, wear-part replacement, and balancing.

faqs.question: Can you supply Podbielniak centrifuge parts?
faqs.answer: We carry a wide variety of OEM-equivalent Baker Perkins Podbielniak parts and can reverse engineer and fabricate hard-to-find or long-lead components in-house, often within days.

faqs.question: What happens after my Podbielniak centrifuge is inspected?
faqs.answer: You receive a comprehensive report detailing the service findings, a recommendation on how to proceed, and a list of the parts required to complete the repair before any work begins.

todos: TODO(verify: legacy page describes Podbielniak as a decanter centrifuge; historically Podbielniak is known for centrifugal contactors/extractors used in liquid-liquid extraction. Confirm which machine types Centrifuge World services before expanding typesServiced and modelsServiced)
